title: malaxis maboroensis
intro: Malaxis maboroensis, also known as Maboro's malaxis, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. This orchid has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Malaxis maboroensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Malaxis maboroensis often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which are used to treat various ailments.
